prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Widow in Cabin 9
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a Christmas ornament turning up wet
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: unopened letter, blood-adjacent tea towel, scarf with impossible timing

- Mara Vale | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=hardware store owner | threat_aura=0.33 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=knows where evidence should have been
- Jenna Bell | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.6 | space=toolshed described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably
- Luke Hawthorne | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.9 | space=marina tackle room described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Cole Hawthorne | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.34 | space=toolshed described as retreat supplies | secrets=covered for someone out of shame; knows where evidence should have been
- Mara Hawthorne | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.48 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Tess Sutton | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Noah Sutton | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Mara Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Rachel Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Mara?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Rachel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The unopened letter is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Luke."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
